title: cyclopogon lineatus
intro: Cyclopogon lineatus, also known as the "Cinnamon Sedge" or "Brazilian Cinnamon," is a type of flowering plant in the family Bromeliaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Cyclopogon lineatus include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the plant's rhizomes and leaves can be used to make teas, tinctures, or infusions, allowing for the extraction of its bioactive compounds.
